{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/01-svyazi/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "Svyazi[^svyazi] 2.0 — Архитектура и исследование"
tags:
  * svyazi
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. Svyazi[^svyazi] 2.0 — Архитектура и исследование

_Файлов:_ 15

h2. Содержание

* [[00-intro-part2|00-intro-part2.md]] — 
* [[01-executive-summary|01-executive-summary.md]] — 
* [[02-methodology|02-methodology.md]] — 
* [[03-component-catalog|03-component-catalog.md]] — <!-- tags: memory, rag, orchestration, security, knowledge, ingestion, local-first, architecture, roadmap, self-improvem…
* [[04-ensembles-overview|04-ensembles-overview.md]] — 
* [[06-security-privacy|06-security-privacy.md]] — 
* [[07-mvp-planning|07-mvp-planning.md]] — 
* [[08-conclusions|08-conclusions.md]] — 
* [[09-architectural-gaps|09-architectural-gaps.md]] — 
* [[10-second-order-ensembles|10-second-order-ensembles.md]] — 
* [[11-integration-contracts|11-integration-contracts.md]] — 
* [[12-roadmap|12-roadmap.md]] — 
* [[13-contacts|13-contacts.md]] — 
* [[14-limitations|14-limitations.md]] — 
* [[QA|QA.md]] — _Автоматически сгенерировано по 14 файлам раздела._

h2. Подразделы

* [ensembles/|ensembles/] — Ансамбли проектов




----

[^svyazi]: Главный проект: экосистема AI-компонентов
